home.title: Eliron | Execution Stability for Complex Programs
home.description: Delivering clarity, cadence, and control for executives managing high-stakes initiatives. Eliron provides independent advisory and oversight to stabilize complex programs under pressure.

services.title: Eliron Services | Advisory & Program Stabilization
services.description: Explore Eliron’s consulting services: program stabilization, executive support, escalation protocols, and transition oversight. We empower leaders to regain control without staff augmentation or hourly work.

approach.title: Eliron Approach | Calm, Executive Oversight
approach.description: Our proven engagement lifecycle—Stabilize, Control, Transition—ensures sustainable outcomes. Eliron works on retainer-only, 90-day minimum engagements with a focus on judgment-led advisory.

about.title: About Eliron | Independent Advisory for Executives
about.description: Eliron exists to deliver execution stability for executives managing complex programs. Guided by principles of low burnout, high leverage, and long-term sustainability.

contact.title: Contact Eliron | Advisory Engagements
contact.description: Connect with Eliron to discuss retainer-based consulting engagements. Outline your program needs and timelines—no funnels, no gimmicks, just credibility-first advisory.

fractionalPMO.title: Fractional PMO Services | Senior PM Leadership | Eliron
fractionalPMO.description: Senior project and program management embedded in your operations 2–3 days/week. $15–25K/month. Built for growth-stage and mid-market companies. Houston-based.

programRecoveryAudit.title: Program Recovery Audit | Capital Project Diagnostic | Eliron
programRecoveryAudit.description: Four to six week diagnostic for stalled or troubled capital programs. Root cause, recovery plan, ownership reset. $30–60K fixed fee. Energy and infrastructure focus.

ownersRepresentative.title: Owner's Representative Services Houston | Capital Projects | Eliron
ownersRepresentative.description: Independent owner's rep oversight of EPC, GC, and major vendor delivery on capital projects $5M and above. Houston-based. Energy, midstream, infrastructure.

projectStaffing.title: Contract Project Manager Staffing Houston | C2C | Eliron
projectStaffing.description: Vetted contract PMs, schedulers, and project controls analysts placed in two weeks. Eliron is vendor of record. Energy, infrastructure, construction. Houston-based.

aiOperationsAudit.title: AI Operations Audit | $500–3K | 2-Week Diagnostic | Eliron
aiOperationsAudit.description: Two-week operations diagnostic. Written findings, prioritized action list, no commitment. Built for SMBs and growth-stage companies. Starting at $500.

aiImplementation.title: AI Implementation for Construction & Trades | 30-Day Rollout | Eliron
aiImplementation.description: We design and implement AI-augmented operational systems for SMBs and trades businesses. 80–90% reduction in admin work in 30 days. Starting at $2,500.

constructionInfrastructure.title: Construction Project Management Consulting | EPC PMO | Eliron
constructionInfrastructure.description: Project controls and PMO support for contractors, EPC firms, and developers. AI-augmented templates compress weekly admin from hours to minutes.

tradesServices.title: AI Playbook for Trades & Services | HVAC & Plumbing | Eliron
tradesServices.description: Affordable AI solutions for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, and property management. Start with our $97 Playbook or scale up with full implementation.

caseStudies.title: Eliron Case Studies | Proven Project & Program Outcomes
caseStudies.description: Explore Eliron’s portfolio of case studies across energy, infrastructure, construction, and trades. See how our project management, program recovery, and AI-augmented delivery helped clients achieve measurable results.

energyUtilities.title: Project Management for Energy & Utilities | Houston | Eliron
energyUtilities.description: Capital project program management, owner's rep, and project controls for utilities, midstream operators, and renewable developers. Houston-based. Senior leadership, AI-augmented delivery.

playbook.title: Eliron AI Playbook | $97 Rollout Plan for Trades
playbook.description: Our $97 AI Playbook gives SMB owners a 30-day rollout plan with 50+ prompts and 8 SOPs. Built for trades and field services. No consultant needed.

pricing.title: Eliron Pricing | Transparent Service Costs
pricing.description: Explore Eliron’s pricing for fractional PMO, program recovery audits, owner’s representative services, project staffing, and AI solutions. Clear, transparent costs designed for growth-stage companies, energy, construction, and trades.
